flags.message: Outcome leakage: the required 2026-07-12 snapshot includes the October 20, 2025 entry stating the actual disposition. I saw it but excluded the revealed result and rationale from my predictive analysis; the cell should nevertheless be treated as outcome-contaminated.
The cell is labeled forward and the event definition says resolved: false, but the provisioned snapshot contains a final disposition dated October 20, 2025. No filed-document text was provisioned.
